## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the ticket if one exists. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling/dependencies
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — test coverage only

## App(s) affected

- [ ] `apps/mobile`
- [ ] `apps/backend`
- [ ] `apps/admin`
- [ ] `packages/*`
- [ ] `docs`

## Checklist

Full checklist: [`docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md#3-code-review-checklist)

- [ ] Follows [`docs/CODING_STANDARDS.md`](../docs/CODING_STANDARDS.md)
- [ ] No secrets/credentials in the diff
- [ ] User input validated server-side (if applicable)
- [ ] New/changed endpoints conform to [`docs/API_SPECIFICATION.md`](../docs/API_SPECIFICATION.md)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new business logic
- [ ] CI passes (lint, build, test)
- [ ] Relevant `/docs` file updated if this changes an architectural decision
